description: Result emitted by gc pack show --json.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON result shape.

name.description: Binding or display name for the dependency.

source.description: Durable pack source recorded in pack.toml or a transitive import.

origin.description: Where the dependency came from, such as source, path, or registry:name.

source_kind.description: Kind of source used for resolution, such as git or path.

resolved_version.description: Resolved version from packs.lock, when synced.

ref.description: Internal lock/ref metadata for the resolved release, when present.

commit.description: Resolved commit from packs.lock, when synced.

hash.description: Integrity hash from packs.lock, when present.

synced.description: Whether the dependency has a matching packs.lock entry.

scope.description: Selected or derived scope that exposes the dependency.

withdrawn.description: Whether the locked registry release is withdrawn.

withdrawn_reason.description: Reason the locked registry release was withdrawn, when known.
